name: openweathermap-mcp-server
description: A lightweight MCP server using Bun to fetch current and 5-day weather data from OpenWeatherMap APIs. Built with @modelcontextprotocol/sdk, Zod for validation, and Axios for API calls. Provides tools to get weather info by latitude and longitude over stdio transport.

status_cleared.reason: SM cleanup: only full_pipeline pass is real pass. Needs re-verification.
